problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance may resolve What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
